strengths: 18+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure; currently building AI-agent frameworks (MCP code generators) at re:cinq, actively applying knowledge in strategic AI infrastructure work

Proven entrepreneurial leader through 9-year stewardship of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with active production adoption by Green Map, demonstrating ability to identify market needs, sustain complex vision, and inspire community participation

Consistent pattern of teaching leadership and software craftsmanship advocacy across organizations, with demonstrated ability to inspire technical excellence through workshops, talks on web internals and testing, and community code katas
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI; educational background is general computer science rather than the specialized AI/ML training listed as preferred for this strategy role
AI engagement is recent and infrastructure-focused (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) rather than demonstrated expertise building AI-powered products or platforms that customers depend on

Career exhibits strong technical execution and mentoring, but limited explicit evidence of advising strategic customers on technology adoption or directing organizational-level technical strategy at director scale
response.justification: The candidate brings 18+ years of proven engineering excellence, entrepreneurial vision, and active engagement with AI infrastructure to this Director-level strategic role. Their decade-long stewardship of GISCollective, combined with current work on MCP frameworks and agentic infrastructure at re:cinq, demonstrates both sustained execution ability and trajectory into the core focus area. While lacking formal AI education and dedicated AI product experience—a meaningful gap—their demonstrated capacity to master complex technical domains, inspire communities, and identify opportunities provides foundation for growth. The combination of seniority, entrepreneurial mindset, teaching capability, and current AI infrastructure work positions them to contribute valuable perspective on cloud and AI platform strategy while building deeper AI expertise on the job.
